settings.heading: Settings
settings.apiTypeHint: Responses uses the OpenAI Responses API. Chat Completions uses /chat/completions.

baseUrlHint.openai: Only for the official OpenAI API. OpenAI-Compatible APIs will not work with this provider.
baseUrlHint.ollama: Local: 'http://localhost:11434' Set the OLLAMA_ORIGINS environment variable to 'http://*' or '*' for local deployments.

settings.name: Name
settings.mainProviderDescription: The default provider used for chat and world building. All pipeline roles fall back to this when not explicitly assigned.
settings.minorTaskAgentDescription: Lightweight LLM for background tasks like phrase extraction and template fitting. Use a small, fast model.
settings.enableMemoryDescription: Automatically save and recall context from past conversations.
settings.memoryUnavailableNoVec: Memory requires sqlite-vec, which is only available in the desktop app.
settings.memoryProviderDescription: The LLM provider used to extract memories from chat responses.
settings.embeddingProviderDescription: The provider used to generate embeddings for memory search.
settings.phraseHighlightingDescription: Automatically extract and highlight key phrases in narrative text. Requires Minor Task Agent.
settings.directorModeDescription: Add persistent notes that can override the story’s planned direction. Director Notes strongly influence the plot and may trigger cascading cause-and-effect changes depending on their content. Use them carefully.
settings.pipelineRolesDescription: Assign providers to each pipeline phase. All default to the main provider.
settings.plotPlannerDescription: Plans the scene plot and pacing before writing.
settings.enablePlotPlannerDescription: When enabled, a scene plot is generated for each scene, which enhances pacing and narrative direction for future scenes.
settings.writerDescription: Writes the narrative prose from the scene plot.
settings.reviewerDescription: Reviews writer output for violations against writing rules.
settings.enableReviewerDescription: When enabled, the reviewer checks the writer's output for rule violations, enhancing the quality of the written prose at the cost of additional time and tokens.
settings.reviewerModeDetailedDescription: More accurate, but some thinking models may spend a lot of effort reviewing.
settings.reviewerModeQuickDescription: A lightweight alternative, but weaker at detecting rule violations and maintaining plot consistency and quality.
settings.editorDescription: Revises writer output based on reviewer feedback.
settings.gameMasterDescription: Generates game data (decisions, plot threads) from the narrative.
settings.summarizerDescription: Updates the act summary after each scene.
settings.targetWordCountDescription: Target word count per scene for the Writer phase. Default: 400.
settings.compressorIntervalDescription: Scenes between character profile compression runs. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 5.
settings.plotModeDescription: Guidance-based runs the Plot Planner every turn. Event-based structures the story through narrative phases and runs the Plot Planner at a configurable frequency.
settings.reevaluationFrequencyDescription: Scenes between Plot Planner runs in Event-based mode. Lower values give tighter pacing control. Default: 10.
settings.localeDescription: Language for the app interface. New stories will use this locale by default.
settings.logLevelDescription: Debug logs include full AI chat context. Logs are written to the app log directory.
settings.noProvidersAdd: No providers configured. Add one to get started.
settings.dataDescription: Export and import your application data for backup or migration.
settings.exportDatabaseDescription: Download a copy of all your stories, settings, and data as a zip file.
settings.importDatabaseDescription: Restore from a previously exported backup zip file.
settings.importWarning: Importing will replace ALL current data — stories, settings, providers, and config files. Existing stories will be deleted.
settings.importRecommendExport: It is strongly recommended to export your current data before importing.
settings.dataWebNotice: Your data is stored in the browser. Export regularly to avoid data loss.
settings.resetConfigurationDescription: Remove all configuration files and restore settings to their defaults. Stories are not affected.
settings.resetConfigurationWarning: This will delete all customized prompts, locale strings, and settings. Story data will be preserved. This cannot be undone.
settings.gameDataDescription: Your stories, messages, and databases. Does not include configuration.
settings.exportGameDataDescription: Download a copy of your stories and databases as a zip file.
settings.importGameDataDescription: Restore stories and databases from a previously exported game data backup.
settings.importGameDataWarning: Importing will replace all current stories and databases. Existing stories will be deleted.
settings.deleteAllGameDataDescription: Permanently delete all stories and their associated folders. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAllGameDataWarning: This will permanently delete all stories, messages, act data, and their associated story folders. This cannot be undone.
settings.configDataDescription: Settings, AI providers, and prompt templates. Does not include story data.
settings.exportConfigDataDescription: Download a copy of your settings and customized prompts as a zip file.
settings.importConfigDataDescription: Restore settings and prompts from a previously exported configuration backup.
settings.importConfigDataWarning: Importing will replace all current configuration — settings, providers, and prompt templates. This cannot be undone.
settings.wispProxyUrlHint: Connects to a Wisp proxy server (e.g. wisp-server-python) to route API requests without browser CORS restrictions.

chat.emptyState: Create a story, add an act, then select or create an act line to start chatting.
chat.emptyChat: Type a message to start chatting with the AI.
chat.worldBuilderPrompt: Answer questions to build your story's world. Say "let's start" when ready.
chat.worldBuilderPlaceholder:
Describe your world...

Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line.
chat.chatPlaceholder:
Type your message...

Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line.

sidebar.worldBuilderDescription: Guided interview to create a world from scratch with AI assistance.
sidebar.importWorldDescription: Bring an existing world document and start playing immediately.
sidebar.deleteStoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? All acts and lines within this story will also be removed.
sidebar.deleteActConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? All lines within this act will also be removed.
sidebar.deleteLineConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? All messages in this line will also be removed.
sidebar.deleteGenericConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?

chatControls.actEndDecisionContext: The act has concluded. What would you like to do next?

worldBuilderControls.worldReadyPrompt: Your world document is ready. Create the story and start your adventure?
worldBuilderControls.createStoryDescription: Create the story and begin your adventure right away.
worldBuilderControls.discussDirectionDescription: Discuss the story's direction before starting your adventure.
worldBuilderControls.generatingPlot: Generating act plot and starting the game...
worldBuilderControls.storyNamePlaceholder: Enter the name of the story…

characterCards.heading: Generate Character Cards
characterCards.canonicalNamesHint: Canonical names must remain consistent throughout the entire story.
characterCards.perActLineHint: Character cards are maintained per act line (not globally).
characterCards.overwriteHint: If a card for the current act line already exists, it will be overwritten
characterCards.lineageContextHint: Cards are generated from the current act's content. If cards exist for the current act line and previous acts in the lineage, their content contributes to generation context.

importWorld.heading: Import World
importWorld.noActsAdded: No acts added. Click "Add Act" to add one.
importWorld.noCharactersAdded: No characters added. Click "Add Character" to add one.
importWorld.storyImportedSuccessfully: Story imported successfully. You can find it in the sidebar.
importWorld.reviewDescription: Review the imported messages below. Remove any you don't want to import.

memoryManager.heading: Memory Manager
memoryManager.memoryDisabled: Memory is currently disabled in Settings.
memoryManager.noStorySelected: No story selected. Select a story in the sidebar.
memoryManager.configureEmbedding: Please configure an embedding provider in Settings first.
memoryManager.actCardOverrideConfirm: The existing act card will be overridden. Continue?
memoryManager.regenerateMemoriesConfirm: All existing memories for this act line will be deleted and re-extracted. This may take a while depending on the number of exchanges. Continue?
memoryManager.resetMemoriesConfirm: Delete all memories and locations? This cannot be undone.

fileManager.title: File Manager
fileManager.selectFile: Select a file to preview its contents
fileManager.selectFileMobile: Tap the menu button (☰) in the header above to open the file list, then select a file.
fileManager.deleteWarning: This folder and all its contents will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
fileManager.overrideExists: This file already exists in the story folder. Overwrite?
fileManager.obsoleteDescription: This file is obsolete and no longer part of the app configuration.
fileManager.overrideDescription: This is a story-specific override of a config file.
fileManager.deleteFileWarning: This file will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

loadStory.heading: Load Story
loadStory.missingFolderName: Story folder not found in archive
loadStory.overwriteWarning: This will overwrite existing story data, including acts, act lines, messages, and file system files. This cannot be undone.
loadStory.overwriteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to overwrite the existing story "{{name}}"?
loadStory.noLinesSelected: Select at least one act line to load

errors.storyCreationFailed: Story creation failed: missing act line or story reference

tts.ttsDescription: Allow the app to read narrative messages aloud in English.
tts.ttsLanguageNote: TTS is only available for English stories.
tts.voiceDescription: Choose a voice for text-to-speech playback. American English and British English voices are available.
tts.speedDescription: Adjust the speaking speed. 1× is normal.
tts.previewDescription: Listen to a sample passage with the current voice and speed settings.
tts.downloadModelDescription: The TTS model needs to be downloaded before text-to-speech can be used. This is approximately 300 MB.
tts.downloadError: Failed to download TTS model. Please try again.
